title: No Dried Ghast Recipe
description: Removes the Dried Ghast recipe. Steve shouldn't craft life.
body:
# No Dried Ghast Recipe
Very simple datapack that removes the recipe for crafting dried ghast. Steve shouldn't craft life. And yes, golems don't have a soul and wither is an undead mob.

![Shows that the crafting recipe for dried ghast doesn't work anymore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81aeb04bdcfbb837f1e7c78ef55c667fa5117c1b.png)

## Version: <FONT COLOR="#68efaa">1.21.6</FONT>+
